type.description: Discriminant for the envelope variant. Five values are observed in the wild on Codex >= 0.45 rollouts.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 timestamp at which Codex emitted the line.

payload.description: Variant-specific payload. Schemas for each variant live in the Codex CLI source; this fixture only enforces top-level envelope shape.

_meta.source: hand-coded fallback; replace via 'node scripts/regen-codex-schema.js' when a Codex CLI with 'app-server generate-internal-json-schema' is installed
